channel.title: OpenPrinting News
channel.description: Latest news and updates from the OpenPrinting project

item.title: OpenPrinting News - Opportunity Open Source 4.0 - Call for Locations
item.author: Till
item.description: Where will the 4th edition take place? Please send us your proposal!

item.title: OpenPrinting News - Tech over Tea #300 - Brodie interviews Till Kamppeter
item.author: Till
item.description: Everything about OpenPrinting, history, what we are doing, funding and the future, ...

item.title: CUPS 2.4.15
item.author: Zdenek
item.description: CUPS 2.4.15 fixes two CVEs in scheduler

item.title: OpenPrinting News - Google Summer of Code 2025 - Our most successful one!
item.author: Till
item.description: That's a wrap! All the 11 contributors have made it!

item.title: OpenPrinting News - Sovereign Tech Agency is investing in OpenPrinting
item.author: Till
item.description: I am covered to work on OpenPrinting full-time until end-2026

item.title: OpenPrinting News - Opportunity Open Source 3.0 in the IIT Kanpur, India
item.author: Till
item.description: For our third edition we returned to Kanpur

item.title: OpenPrinting News - UbuCon Asia 2025 in Kathmandu, Nepal
item.author: Till
item.description: Organized by the Ubuntu and GNOME communities of Nepal

item.title: CUPS 2.4.13
item.author: Zdenek
item.description: CUPS 2.4.13 fixes important and moderate vulnerabilities

item.title: CUPS 2.4.14
item.author: Zdenek
item.description: CUPS 2.4.14 fixes installation of localized files

item.title: OpenPrinting News - Opportunity Open Source 3.0 - Schedules and contributions published
item.author: Till
item.description: Have a look into the amazing presentations and workshops, plan your participation!

item.title: OpenPrinting News - Google Summer of Code 2025 - The amazing work is going on!
item.author: Till
item.description: The contributors have passed the midterm evaluations and their projects are taking shape ... And we also have some volunteers!

item.title: OpenPrinting News - 25 years of working full-time for printing with free/open-source-software
item.author: Till
item.description: Dedicated to make printing just work ... And the show must go on!

item.title: OpenPrinting News - Opportunity Open Source 3.0 - We are looking for sponsors
item.author: Till
item.description: No conference without solid support - Wide range of sponsorship packages available

item.title: OpenPrinting News - Opportunity Open Source 3.0 - No deadline any more for Call for Proposals
item.author: Till
item.description: We accept proposals up to the conference dates, but we already start accepting and scheduling

item.title: OpenPrinting News - Opportunity Open Source 3.0 - No UbuCon India co-hosted with us
item.author: Till
item.description: We will just run the OOSC, as last year, without UbuCon ... And we need more session proposals ...

item.title: OpenPrinting News - Google Summer of Code 2025 - Contributors selected and projects started
item.author: Till
item.description: 11 Contributors on CUPS 3.x desktop integration, fuzz testing, visual analysis of print filter output, Rust support, and more ...

item.title: OpenPrinting News - Opportunity Open Source 3.0 - Call for Proposals extended to July 16
item.author: Till
item.description: A conference is great because its content is amazing, therefore we need more ...

item.title: OpenPrinting News - Opportunity Open Source 3.0
item.author: Till
item.description: Opportunity Open Source 3.0, again in IIT Kanpur in India, on Sep 5-7, co-located with the first UbuCon India

item.title: CUPS 2.4.12
item.author: Zdenek
item.description: CUPS 2.4.12 brings enhancements in IPP encryption and debugging

item.title: OpenPrinting News - We got a Framework RISC-V board from DeepComputing
item.author: Till
item.description: RISC-V board for OpenPrinting for development and testing, getting it all to work, Ubuntu Desktop, Snap on RISC-V
